reasoning_chain_text:
1. Within 2017 through 2022, find the year with the lowest total RGRTA ridership.
2. In that year, compare violent-crime counts for Erie County and Westchester County.
3. Select the county with the higher violent-crime count.
4. Return the county seat city for that county.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with lowest RGRTA ridership (2017-2022) -> 2021
HOP 2 (d=1, data.gov - node 2 depends on node 1):
Node 2: 2021 violent crimes -> Erie County (3,493) vs Westchester County (1,520) -> Erie County
HOP 3 (d=1, Wikipedia - node 3 depends on node 2):
Node 3: Buffalo is the county seat of Erie County -> Buffalo
original_ifnal_question: Which county seat corresponds to the New York county that recorded more violent crimes in the year (within 2017-2022) that has the lowest total ridership reported by the Rochester Genesee Regional Transportation Authority when comparing Erie County and Westchester County? Return the city name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
